vcep_full_name: ENIGMA BRCA1/2 Variant Curation Expert Panel

PM2._note: ENIGMA SVI: PM2 downgraded to supporting; threshold 1/100,000

PVS1._note: BRCA2 PVS1 applies through last 10% of protein (different from BRCA1)

_notes: Note BRCA2 PVS1 differs from BRCA1: terminal truncations may still be pathogenic.
